action.reasoning: Observation: Best is 0.5889 (iter11: replay 500/task + KD beta0.5 T=2 + consold 5eps, val~0.59, early tasks~0.46-0.5 late~0.7-0.8). Iter12 changes (lr5e-4, 8eps/task, mem450, beta0.4 T4, cosine) dropped to 0.5689. Train.py truncated at KD, curves often broken (sparse logs). Analysis: Replay+KD+consolidation works well but hyperparams sensitive; memory selection balanced via meta but can be improved; dense logging needed for curves; current RN18+adapt good. Decision: Fully rewrite clean train.py (complete non-truncated KD with T=2 beta=0.6, mem=650/task for ~65/cls, epochs/task=6, consold=5@lower_lr, Adam lr=5e-4 wd=1e-5, global cosine scheduler reset per task, dense logging every 20 steps with train acc, val after every epoch, track+save best on val, proper balanced mem update with torch). Keep model.py/predict.py. Train then submit_eval to target >0.60 avg_acc.
